name: Cherry Blossom Sans
description:
Welcome to BlossomTale!

This is the home to Blossom Sans and Blossom Papyrus. It's an AU similar to the normal UnderTale but the surrounding trees are cherry blossoms instead of pine trees and the sky is a light pastel pink instead of the normal blue. The rest of the characters like Alphys, Undyne, Napstablook, Toriel, Asriel, and Asgore are there too. The town of Snowdin includes Grillby's bar, the town Library, the Hotel, and the corner store.
creator: WastedxxLife
